creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not a troubleticket, but something that you should install 
gettext under FreeBSD (/usr/ports/devel/gettext, or pkg_add -r gettext) 
and be done with it :) goodluck, for futrther qu estions please ask 
questions@freebsd.org for the required help :)
